[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Baradis''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] officer stationed aboard ''[[Blue Diver]]'' as of [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. He was attracted to [[Syal Antilles]].
